title: Elph MCP configuration
description: Reserved schema for future MCP server definitions under ~/.elph. Not yet consumed by the runtime.

servers.description: Named MCP server entries keyed by server id.

command.description: Executable used to start the MCP server.

args.description: Arguments passed to the MCP server command.

env.description: Environment variables for the MCP server process.

enabled.description: When false, the server is not started.
